mapper.select: select email, code, verified, expires_at, created_at from email_verification where email = #{email}
mapper.insert: insert into email_verification ( email, code, verified, expires_at, created_at ) values ( #{email}, #{code}, 'N', #{expires_at}, sysdate )
mapper.update: update email_verification set code = #{code}, verified = 'N', expires_at = #{expires_at}, created_at = sysdate where email = #{email}
mapper.select: select count(*) from email_verification where email = #{email} and verified = 'Y'
